element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational mechanic; improved from previous iteration per reviews
core tactical control - switch between any of 11 team members
identified as weak in previous game, improved in '95; requires situational awareness
identified as weak point in predecessor; improved mechanics in '95

element_introduction_order.first_appears: match end (if draw after extra time)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: new feature in '95; replaces next-goal-wins mechanic; high-pressure scenario
up to 4 players can each control different footballers simultaneously

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous real-time flow with natural tension peaks during goal-threatening situations; penalty shootout provides discrete high-tension climax

difficulty_curve.early_game: introductory match against lower-difficulty AI opponents available
difficulty_curve.mid_game: progressive opponent difficulty scaling based on team selection
notable_spikes: matches against licensed European clubs with distinct team tactics

notable_level_patterns.description: Player selects from club sides across 6 European leagues (Premier League, Ligue 1, Bundesliga, Serie A, Eredivisie, La Liga) plus Brazilian and American clubs; each match is discrete unit with consistent 11v11 structure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Premier League team match (e.g., Tottenham Hotspur)

notable_level_patterns.description: Isometric field view; full 90-minute match; 11 controllable teammates; computer controls remaining players; tension escalates in final minutes and extra time
New feature in '95; activates only if match ends in draw after extra time; provides discrete high-pressure moment where player takes 5 penalties in sequence
